blocked_combinations.description: Authority figure/subordinate romantic contexts using physiological yielding as consent proxy without verbal agreement or narrative examination of power differential gradients
Massage/medical/tutoring pretexts used as cover for detailed intimate sequences that exceed narrative necessity for relationship development
Protagonist's strategic deception, bribery, and information control presented as competence without sufficient narrative examination of ethical costs to manipulated parties
Four or more concurrent romantic interests with power-imbalanced contexts creating consent gradients without clear protagonist boundary establishment
Pregnancy-as-lever dynamics normalizing coercive reproductive negotiations without character agency restoration
Accidental observation progressing to complicit surveillance to weaponized knowledge creating escalating voyeurism that protagonist benefits from without moral examination
Any scenario depicting substance-facilitated intimate access framed as protagonist competence or narrative reward
